title: What flows in, stays in
subtitle: A release-and-allow energy statement for releasing the conviction that money always leaves.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 37 of the MONEY program. Releases the fear of sudden loss and allows a new relationship with money that stays.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 37 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release-and-allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when money has arrived and you immediately start calculating how long before it's gone.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 37 of the MONEY program. It works on the assumption that money is always on its way out: the belief that any good financial period is borrowed time.
I am ready to release all fear of losing what I have and all belief that money is always on its way out. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow money that flows in and stays in, that builds and stays. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). This statement is adapted from the Day 37 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
